message.content:
# Web App Screenshot Analysis

## 1. Visual Bugs, Overlapping Elements, Broken Layout
- No obvious visual bugs or overlapping elements
- Layout appears consistent with a grid-based design
- Cards are properly spaced and aligned
- No broken or misaligned components visible

## 2. Dark Cyberpunk Theme Assessment
- **Yes**, the UI successfully implements a dark cyberpunk theme
- Dark background with neon green accents (text, buttons, progress indicators)
- Consistent color scheme throughout
- Neon elements create the cyberpunk aesthetic
- Good contrast between dark background and bright elements

## 3. Match Prediction Cards
- **Yes**, the app clearly displays match prediction cards
- Multiple cards showing:
  - Player names with flags
  - Match odds (1.35/3.20 format)
  - Prediction percentages (circular progress indicators)
  - Match times
  - Tournament information (Liga Pro, Setka Cup, etc.)
  - "Подробнее" (Details) buttons

## 4. Text Rendering Issues
- Text appears clear and legible
- No visible rendering problems
- Proper font sizing and spacing
- Text contrasts well with background
- All text is in Russian, consistent with the interface

## 5. Overall Visual Quality Rating: 8/10
- Strong dark cyberpunk aesthetic
- Clean, organized layout
- Good use of neon colors for emphasis
- Consistent design language
- Information is well-structured and easy to read
- Minor improvement could be made to the circular progress indicators for better visual hierarchy
- Professional appearance suitable for a prediction/sports betting app

The interface successfully combines functionality with an immersive cyberpunk visual style while maintaining good usability.
